title: 3 Idiots
synopsis: Two friends search for their long-lost college genius who taught them to chase excellence, not success.
actual_ending: Rancho is revealed to be the real Phunsukh Wangdu, a celebrated scientist running a school in Ladakh; the friends reunite happily.

title: Lagaan: Once Upon a Time in India
synopsis: Villagers in colonial India agree to a high-stakes cricket match against their British rulers to escape an unfair tax.
actual_ending: The villagers win the match, the lagaan is cancelled for three years, and the rains finally arrive.

title: Sholay
synopsis: A retired police officer hires two small-time crooks to capture a ruthless dacoit who massacred his family.
actual_ending: Jai dies sacrificing himself; Veeru defeats Gabbar, who is handed over to the police as Thakur watches.

title: Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge
synopsis: Two NRIs fall in love on a Eurail trip but must convince her traditional father to break off her arranged marriage.
actual_ending: Simran's father lets go of her hand on the train platform; she runs to Raj as the train pulls away.

title: Swades
synopsis: A NASA scientist returns to India to find his childhood nanny and ends up rebuilding a forgotten village.
actual_ending: Mohan resigns from NASA, marries Gita, and settles in India to bring electricity and education to the village.

title: Rang De Basanti
synopsis: A British filmmaker's documentary about Indian freedom fighters awakens five carefree friends to modern injustice.
actual_ending: The friends assassinate the corrupt minister, take over a radio station to confess, and are gunned down by the army.

title: Munna Bhai M.B.B.S.
synopsis: A lovable Mumbai gangster fakes his way into medical school to please his father and discovers the healing power of hugs.
actual_ending: Munna's 'jaadu ki jhappi' philosophy wins over the dean; he reconciles with his father and the patients.

title: Taare Zameen Par
synopsis: A boarding-school teacher recognises that a struggling eight-year-old has dyslexia and helps him discover his gift.
actual_ending: Ishaan wins the school art competition; his stunned parents finally see his brilliance and embrace him.

title: Dangal
synopsis: A former wrestler trains his two daughters to become world-class athletes against a deeply patriarchal society.
actual_ending: Geeta wins gold at the Commonwealth Games; her father, locked in a storeroom, hears the national anthem and weeps.

title: PK
synopsis: An alien stranded on Earth questions India's religious dogma while searching for the remote that will take him home.
actual_ending: PK exposes the fraudulent godman on live TV, recovers his remote, and returns to his planet — bringing a friend.

title: Andaz Apna Apna
synopsis: Two slackers compete to marry a wealthy heiress and end up tangled with twin villains and a kidnapping plot.
actual_ending: The duo defeats Crime Master Gogo and Teja, both win their loves, and the millions are returned to the family.

title: Black Friday
synopsis: A meticulous procedural about the police investigation following the 1993 Bombay serial blasts.
actual_ending: Most conspirators are arrested over years of dogged police work; the film closes on the human cost of the bombings.

title: A Wednesday!
synopsis: A Mumbai commissioner gets a call from a man who claims he has planted bombs across the city.
actual_ending: The caller turns out to be a common man avenging terror victims; he kills four terrorists and walks free unidentified.

title: Gangs of Wasseypur
synopsis: A coal-belt blood feud between two clans plays out across three generations of revenge in Dhanbad.
actual_ending: Sardar Khan is gunned down at a petrol pump as his wife waits in the car; the cycle of vengeance continues into Part 2.

title: Queen
synopsis: A jilted Delhi bride goes on her honeymoon to Paris and Amsterdam alone — and finds herself.
actual_ending: Rani returns to India confident, hands her ring back to her ex-fiancé, and walks out smiling.

title: Barfi!
synopsis: A deaf-mute charmer in Darjeeling loves two women across decades — one who marries someone else, one who is autistic.
actual_ending: Barfi spends his life with Jhilmil; both die holding hands in a hospital, watched over by a tearful Shruti.

title: Andhadhun
synopsis: A pianist faking blindness witnesses a murder and gets pulled into an escalating game of betrayal.
actual_ending: Akash narrates a clean version to Sophie in London; a final flick of his cane suggests he is still pretending.

title: Kahaani
synopsis: A pregnant woman arrives in Kolkata searching for her missing husband during Durga Puja.
actual_ending: Vidya is revealed to be a trained agent who came to assassinate the terrorist responsible for her husband's death.

title: Zindagi Na Milegi Dobara
synopsis: Three friends take a Spanish road trip before one of their weddings, each conquering a fear they chose for the others.
actual_ending: All three confront their fears and return changed; Arjun and Laila reunite and Imraan finds his biological father.

title: Special 26
synopsis: A group of con men pose as CBI officers to raid corrupt politicians and businessmen across 1980s India.
actual_ending: After a final mega-heist at Mumbai Jewellers, the gang escapes with the loot, leaving the real CBI fooled.

title: Article 15
synopsis: A Delhi-bred IPS officer posted to a UP village investigates the rape and murder of two Dalit girls.
actual_ending: Ayan exposes the caste conspiracy, recovers a missing girl alive, and forces the system to file the case correctly.

title: Pink
synopsis: Three working women in Delhi face a courtroom battle after defending themselves against assault.
actual_ending: Retired lawyer Deepak Sehgal proves the men's intent; the women are acquitted, the men convicted.

title: Masaan
synopsis: Two parallel stories of grief, caste and shame unfold along the ghats of Varanasi.
actual_ending: Devi and Deepak meet on a boat to Allahabad; strangers, both quietly carrying their losses to a new beginning.

title: Tumbbad
synopsis: A man inherits a cursed family secret in a rain-drenched Maharashtrian village — a hidden god of greed.
actual_ending: Vinayak is consumed by Hastar's hunger; his son survives but inherits the same curse, taking only one coin.

title: Newton
synopsis: An idealistic election officer is sent to conduct polling in a Maoist-infested Chhattisgarh forest.
actual_ending: Newton holds the polling station open until 3pm despite hostile soldiers; back in his old job, he insists on punctuality.

title: Gully Boy
synopsis: A Dharavi rapper chases his hip-hop dream against his family's expectations and his neighbourhood's grind.
actual_ending: Murad wins a national rap battle and signs his first record deal; Safeena waits for him outside, beaming.

title: Lage Raho Munna Bhai
synopsis: Munna starts seeing the ghost of Mahatma Gandhi, who teaches him 'Gandhigiri' to win a radio host's heart.
actual_ending: Munna, exposed on live radio, embraces non-violent truth; he wins Jhanvi over and inspires a wave of Gandhigiri.

title: Dil Chahta Hai
synopsis: Three best friends in modern Mumbai drift apart over love, ego and life choices after college.
actual_ending: After Sid's heartbreak and Akash's epiphany in Sydney, the trio reconciles in a hospital and stays best friends.

title: Kal Ho Naa Ho
synopsis: A cheerful stranger in New York transforms a depressed family — while hiding that he is dying.
actual_ending: Aman dies of his heart condition; Naina marries Rohit, who he had selflessly pushed her toward.

title: Veer-Zaara
synopsis: An Indian Air Force officer spends 22 years in a Pakistani prison for a love he refuses to deny.
actual_ending: A young Pakistani lawyer wins his freedom; Veer reunites with Zaara and crosses the border home.

title: My Name Is Khan
synopsis: A man with Asperger's travels across post-9/11 America to tell the President he is not a terrorist.
actual_ending: Rizwan finally meets the new President, reconciles with Mandira, and helps the small town of Wilhelmina rebuild.

title: Chak De! India
synopsis: A disgraced ex-hockey captain coaches the bickering Indian women's hockey team to redemption.
actual_ending: The team beats Australia in the World Cup final; Kabir Khan walks home a hero, his honour restored.

title: Jab We Met
synopsis: A heartbroken industrialist meets a chatty Punjabi girl on a train and his life unravels — wonderfully.
actual_ending: Aditya stops Geet's wedding to her wrong-fit boyfriend; she chooses him and they begin again.

title: Wake Up Sid
synopsis: A spoiled Mumbai college dropout grows up under the gentle nudge of an aspiring older writer.
actual_ending: Sid kisses Aisha on her terrace as the monsoon arrives; he has finally found his life and a career in photography.

title: Bhaag Milkha Bhaag
synopsis: The story of Milkha Singh, the Flying Sikh, who outran his Partition trauma to almost-glory at the 1960 Olympics.
actual_ending: Milkha returns to Pakistan years later, beats his Olympic rival, and finally lays his ghosts to rest.

title: Manjhi: The Mountain Man
synopsis: A poor labourer in Bihar carves a road through a mountain over 22 years after the hill kills his wife.
actual_ending: Dashrath Manjhi finishes the road single-handedly, shrinking a 55-km journey to 15 km; he becomes a folk hero.

title: M.S. Dhoni: The Untold Story
synopsis: A small-town ticket-collector rises through Indian cricket to lift the 2011 World Cup as captain.
actual_ending: Dhoni hits the iconic six off Kulasekara at Wankhede; India wins the World Cup after 28 years.

title: Bajrangi Bhaijaan
synopsis: A devout Hanuman bhakt vows to return a mute Pakistani girl, separated from her mother, across the border.
actual_ending: Pawan crosses to Pakistan, returns Munni to her family; the girl shouts 'Mama!' for the first time as he walks away.

title: Rocket Singh: Salesman of the Year
synopsis: A modest sales trainee runs an honest 'company within a company' from inside his cynical employer's office.
actual_ending: His scheme is exposed; he leaves on his own terms, founding Rocket Sales Corporation as a fully legitimate firm.

title: Iqbal
synopsis: A deaf-mute village boy with a perfect bowling action chases his dream of playing for India.
actual_ending: Iqbal makes it into the Indian cricket team; his alcoholic coach watches proudly from the stands.

title: Black
synopsis: A relentless teacher draws a deaf-blind girl out of darkness — and decades later, she returns the favour as he loses his mind.
actual_ending: Michelle, now graduated, helps her old teacher Sahai re-learn the alphabet as Alzheimer's takes him.

title: Hera Pheri
synopsis: Three penniless tenants get a wrong-number ransom call and decide to swap places with the kidnappers.
actual_ending: After endless slapstick, the trio rescues the girl and ends up rich; they buy the garage they used to scam.

title: Phir Hera Pheri
synopsis: Raju, Shyam and Baburao gamble their newfound fortune on a 21-day double-money scheme that turns out to be a con.
actual_ending: After a dizzying sequence of swaps, the trio recovers their crores from the gangsters and stays unbearably hopeful.

title: Saathiya
synopsis: A young couple's love marriage frays under daily compromises until tragedy puts everything in perspective.
actual_ending: Aditya finds Suhani after her accident; they reconcile in the hospital and choose to rebuild their marriage.

title: Stree
synopsis: A small-town tailor and his friends discover their village is haunted by a vengeful spirit who abducts only men.
actual_ending: Vicky cuts the spirit's hair to subdue her, and Chanderi finally builds a temple to honour rather than fear her.

title: Bareilly Ki Barfi
synopsis: A small-town printer is forced to play the fictional author of a novel by a girl he secretly loves.
actual_ending: Bitti realises Chirag is the real author who loves her; she chooses him over the impostor on her wedding day.

title: Dum Laga Ke Haisha
synopsis: A reluctant Haridwar groom married to an overweight teacher must literally carry her in a town wife-carrying race.
actual_ending: Prem learns to love Sandhya for who she is; they win the race and the marriage finds its feet.

title: Vicky Donor
synopsis: A jobless Delhi boy is recruited as a sperm donor by an obsessive infertility doctor, then has to confess to his fiancée.
actual_ending: After a fight, Ashima accepts Vicky's secret donations; together they donate openly and start a family.

title: Piku
synopsis: A Delhi architect is held hostage by her hypochondriac father's bowel obsession on a road trip to Kolkata.
actual_ending: Bhaskor dies peacefully after a final perfect motion; Piku learns to live for herself with the cab-owner Rana.

title: Talvar
synopsis: A fictionalised retelling of the Aarushi-Hemraj double-murder investigation, seen from three competing CBI angles.
actual_ending: The third CBI team's botched closure report convicts the parents; the film leaves their guilt deeply uncertain.

title: Haider
synopsis: Vishal Bhardwaj's Hamlet — set in 1995 Kashmir, where a student returns to find his father disappeared.
actual_ending: Haider corners his uncle but, remembering his mother's last words, lets him go; he walks away from revenge.

title: Maqbool
synopsis: A Mumbai don's right-hand man is goaded by his lover (the don's mistress) into murdering his boss.
actual_ending: Maqbool, racked by guilt, watches Nimmi die and is gunned down moments later, the empire already gone to others.

title: Omkara
synopsis: Vishal Bhardwaj's Othello, set in the political badlands of UP.
actual_ending: Omkara strangles Dolly on their wedding bed after Langda's lies; on learning the truth, he shoots himself.

title: Gangs of Wasseypur — Part 2
synopsis: The next generation of the Khan family takes the blood feud to its bloody, drug-soaked finale.
actual_ending: Faizal kills Ramadhir Singh in a Wasseypur lane after a chase through narrow gullies; the feud is finally over.

title: Udaan
synopsis: A 17-year-old expelled from boarding school is dragged back to a brutal father, a job in a steel factory, and a half-brother he never knew.
actual_ending: Rohan beats his father in a footrace, leaves Jamshedpur with his little brother, and heads off to study writing.

title: Khosla Ka Ghosla
synopsis: A retired middle-class Delhi family stages an elaborate sting to reclaim a plot of land grabbed by a bully.
actual_ending: The Khoslas con the conman into 'buying' his own plot back at full price; they get their land and their pride.

title: Oye Lucky! Lucky Oye!
synopsis: A charming Delhi serial burglar steals from the rich and the merely better-off, never quite escaping his class.
actual_ending: Lucky is finally arrested but escapes again from a TV studio mid-interview, vanishing into Delhi's crowds.

title: The Lunchbox
synopsis: A misdelivered Mumbai dabba sparks a tender letter-romance between a lonely accountant and a neglected wife.
actual_ending: Saajan resigns from his Bhutan retirement, returns to Mumbai, and rides off looking for Ila — left ambiguous.

title: Highway
synopsis: A wealthy Delhi bride is kidnapped a week before her wedding and finds unexpected freedom on the road with her abductor.
actual_ending: Mahabir is killed in a police raid in the Himalayas; Veera returns home, confronts her abuser, and lives alone in a hill cottage.

title: Kapoor & Sons
synopsis: Two estranged brothers return to Coonoor when their grandfather has a heart attack — and the family unravels.
actual_ending: After a devastating dinner-table fight and the grandfather's death, the brothers reconcile years later at his memorial.

title: Dear Zindagi
synopsis: A young Mumbai cinematographer in creative limbo seeks therapy from an unconventional Goa-based psychologist.
actual_ending: Kaira makes peace with her parents, finishes her debut film, and meets Jug one last time as a friend.

title: Raazi
synopsis: A Kashmiri student is married into a Pakistani military family in 1971 to spy for Indian intelligence.
actual_ending: Sehmat returns home pregnant after exposing the plot; she raises her son alone, haunted by the lives she ended.

title: Uri: The Surgical Strike
synopsis: A dramatised account of the 2016 Indian surgical strikes against terror launchpads in PoK after the Uri attack.
actual_ending: The strike succeeds with no Indian casualties; Vihaan answers his prime minister's call from across the LoC.

title: Section 375
synopsis: A film director is accused of raping his costume assistant; the case becomes a national debate on consent and law.
actual_ending: The director is convicted on a technicality; both lawyers leave unsure whether justice was served — the verdict deliberately ambivalent.

title: Mulk
synopsis: A Muslim joint family in Varanasi is put on trial after one son is implicated in a terror attack.
actual_ending: Aarti's defence wins; the family is acquitted but Murad Ali's quiet speech about belonging haunts the courtroom.

title: Kesari
synopsis: 21 Sikh soldiers defend Saragarhi fort against 10,000 Afghan tribesmen in 1897.
actual_ending: All 21 soldiers die fighting; their last stand becomes one of the greatest in military history.

title: Mardaani
synopsis: A Mumbai crime-branch officer hunts a child-trafficking kingpin across India.
actual_ending: Shivani lures Karan into a trap; the rescued girls beat him to death as she silently lets it happen.

title: Drishyam
synopsis: A cable-TV operator and his family hide a killing using everything he has learned from the movies.
actual_ending: Vijay outsmarts the police; the body is found buried under a police station the family helped construct.

title: Drishyam 2
synopsis: Seven years later, the past starts to catch up with Vijay Salgaonkar — and a new investigator is on his trail.
actual_ending: Vijay had switched the body years ago; the cops dig up an animal carcass and the case finally collapses.

title: 12th Fail
synopsis: A boy from Chambal who failed his 12th Boards grinds his way through grinding poverty to crack the UPSC.
actual_ending: Manoj clears the Civil Services interview after multiple rejections; he becomes an IPS officer and marries Shraddha.

title: Jawan
synopsis: A masked vigilante and his all-female squad hijack public systems to expose corrupt elites.
actual_ending: Vikram and his son Azad together kill arms-dealer Kalee; Azad continues the crusade as the film teases a sequel.

title: Animal
synopsis: A son's lifelong rage at his absent industrialist father curdles into a dynastic war of revenge.
actual_ending: Ranvijay slaughters his father's enemies, survives an axe to the chest, and limps home — already eyeing a sequel.

title: Thappad
synopsis: A single slap from her husband at a party makes a Delhi housewife rethink her entire marriage.
actual_ending: Amrita walks out of the marriage, refuses an apology she does not believe, and rebuilds her life on her own terms.

title: Don
synopsis: An ordinary lookalike is recruited by Indian police to impersonate the dead Mumbai don Don.
actual_ending: The 'Don' that survives is the real one — he had switched places with Vijay all along; police never realise.

title: Don 2
synopsis: Don breaks out of a Berlin jail to engineer the heist of European currency printing plates.
actual_ending: Don escapes Interpol again, the plates with him; Roma is left holding a fake confession.

title: Krrish
synopsis: The masked superhero Krrish protects Singapore and uncovers his father's fate.
actual_ending: Krrish defeats Dr. Arya, rescues his presumed-dead father Rohit, and reunites the family.

title: Ra.One
synopsis: A game character escapes into the real world; his creator's son must enlist his digital brother G.One to fight back.
actual_ending: G.One destroys Ra.One in Mumbai's Chhatrapati Shivaji station; Sonia and her son carry his memory chip home.

title: Krrish 3
synopsis: Krrish faces Kaal and his army of mutant Maanvars while balancing fatherhood.
actual_ending: Krrish kills Kaal; his son inherits powers from both heroes — a new generation begins.

title: Padmaavat
synopsis: Sultan Alauddin Khilji obsessively lays siege to Chittor for the legendary queen Padmavati.
actual_ending: Ratan Singh dies in single combat; Padmavati and the women perform jauhar before the city falls.

title: Bajirao Mastani
synopsis: The Peshwa Bajirao falls for the half-Muslim warrior princess Mastani; his court refuses to accept her.
actual_ending: Bajirao dies of fever on the banks of the Narmada; Mastani dies the same instant in confinement.

title: Devdas
synopsis: A wealthy heir destroys himself with drink and grief after he is forbidden to marry his childhood love.
actual_ending: Devdas dies at the gate of Paro's mansion; she runs to him as the gates are slammed shut.

title: Kabhi Khushi Kabhie Gham
synopsis: A wealthy patriarch disowns his adopted son for marrying beneath him; years later, the family must heal.
actual_ending: Rahul reunites with his father and family in Diwali sunlight; everyone forgives, everyone hugs, everyone cries.

title: Sultan
synopsis: A retired Haryanvi wrestler returns to MMA to win his estranged wife's respect after a family tragedy.
actual_ending: Sultan wins the Pro Takedown final, donates the prize money to a blood bank, and reunites with Aarfa.

title: Dabangg
synopsis: A swaggering UP cop takes on a corrupt politician, romances a potter's daughter, and reconciles with his step-family.
actual_ending: Chulbul Pandey kills Cheddi Singh, marries Rajjo, and dances his way through his stepfather's funeral.

title: Pad Man
synopsis: Lakshmikant Chauhan invents a low-cost sanitary pad machine to spare rural women shame and infection.
actual_ending: Lakshmi addresses the UN, his invention is rolled out across India, and he reunites tenderly with his estranged wife.

title: Raanjhanaa
synopsis: A Banaras boy's lifelong obsession with his Muslim neighbour ends up tangled in a Delhi student political movement.
actual_ending: Kundan is shot in a campus rally and dies cradled by Zoya; she takes over his political legacy.

title: Stree 2
synopsis: Chanderi faces a new headless horror — and the same band of friends must save the women being abducted.
actual_ending: With Stree's blessing, Vicky beheads the Sarkata; the village celebrates, and a sequel teases more lore.

title: Munjya
synopsis: A Pune boy is haunted by a 150-year-old ghost-uncle who wants to marry his cousin.
actual_ending: The Munjya is exorcised in Konkan; the family ritual frees Bittu to live and love freely.

title: Laapataa Ladies
synopsis: Two veiled brides are accidentally swapped on a train in 2001 rural India; both find unexpected freedom.
actual_ending: Phool reunites with her husband Deepak; Jaya escapes her abusive marriage to study agriculture in Dehradun.

title: Shershaah
synopsis: The life and Kargil heroism of Captain Vikram Batra, PVC.
actual_ending: Vikram Batra is killed at Point 4875 saving a junior officer; Dimple receives his posthumous Param Vir Chakra.

title: Jersey
synopsis: A retired Ranji cricketer in his late thirties attempts a comeback to fulfil his son's wish for a real jersey.
actual_ending: Arjun makes a stunning debut for India; the film reveals the comeback was a story written by his now-grown son.

synopsis: India's underdog 1983 cricket World Cup campaign under Kapil Dev.
actual_ending: Kapil's eleven defeats the West Indies at Lord's; India lifts its first World Cup as a nation roars.

title: Kantara
synopsis: A Karnataka coastal village's ritual link to a forest deity collides with a forest officer and a land-grabbing landlord.
actual_ending: Shiva is possessed by Panjurli during the climactic kola; he kills the landlord and saves the land for the villagers.

title: RRR
synopsis: Two Indian revolutionaries — Bheem and Raju — meet in 1920 Delhi as friends, unaware they are on opposite sides.
actual_ending: Bheem and Raju storm the British armoury together, free the kidnapped Malli, and ride home as legends.

title: Karthik Calling Karthik
synopsis: A meek Mumbai office worker starts getting 5 a.m. calls from himself that turn his life around — until they don't.
actual_ending: Karthik realises the caller was his own dissociative voice; he chooses therapy and life with Shonali.

title: Badhaai Ho
synopsis: A 25-year-old Delhi office worker is mortified when his middle-aged parents announce a pregnancy.
actual_ending: Nakul accepts his baby brother; the family confronts gossip together and welcomes the newborn at the hospital.

title: Tanu Weds Manu
synopsis: An NRI doctor's arranged-marriage trip to Kanpur turns into a chase after a wild girl who is in love with someone else.
actual_ending: After a long detour, Tanu and Manu marry — choosing each other after watching their original lives almost happen.

title: Inception
synopsis: A thief who steals corporate secrets through dream-sharing technology is given the inverse task of planting an idea into the mind of a CEO.
actual_ending: Cobb returns home to his children; the spinning top wobbles before the cut to black, leaving reality ambiguous.

title: The Shawshank Redemption
synopsis: Two imprisoned men bond over years, finding solace and eventual redemption through acts of common decency.
actual_ending: Andy escapes through a tunnel; Red, paroled, finds him on a Mexican beach in Zihuatanejo.

title: The Godfather
synopsis: The aging patriarch of an organized crime dynasty transfers control of his clandestine empire to his reluctant son.
actual_ending: Michael becomes the new Don; the door closes on Kay's face as men kiss his ring.

title: The Dark Knight
synopsis: Batman raises the stakes in his war on crime, helped by Lt. Gordon and DA Harvey Dent, but a criminal mastermind known as the Joker has plans of his own.
actual_ending: Batman takes the blame for Dent's murders and rides into the night, a hunted hero.

title: Pulp Fiction
synopsis: The lives of two mob hitmen, a boxer, a gangster's wife, and a pair of diner bandits intertwine in four tales of violence and redemption.
actual_ending: Jules spares the diner robbers, quoting Ezekiel; he and Vincent walk out into the morning.

title: Forrest Gump
synopsis: The presidencies of Kennedy and Johnson, the events of Vietnam and Watergate unfold from the perspective of an Alabama man with an IQ of 75.
actual_ending: Forrest watches young Forrest board the school bus, a feather drifts off into the wind.

title: Interstellar
synopsis: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival.
actual_ending: Cooper reunites briefly with elderly Murph and leaves to find Brand on a habitable planet.

title: The Matrix
synopsis: A hacker learns from mysterious rebels about the true nature of his reality and his role in the war against its controllers.
actual_ending: Neo flies into the sky after promising to free humanity from the simulation.

title: Gladiator
synopsis: A former Roman General sets out to exact vengeance against the corrupt emperor who murdered his family and sent him into slavery.
actual_ending: Maximus kills Commodus in the arena and dies, reuniting with his family in the afterlife.

title: The Prestige
synopsis: After a tragic accident, two stage magicians engage in a battle to create the ultimate illusion while sacrificing everything they have.
actual_ending: Borden's twin reveal collides with Angier's cloning machine; both have hidden one terrible secret.

title: Fight Club
synopsis: An insomniac office worker and a devil-may-care soap maker form an underground fight club that evolves into much more.
actual_ending: The Narrator shoots himself to kill Tyler, then watches the buildings explode holding Marla's hand.

title: Titanic
synopsis: A seventeen-year-old aristocrat falls in love with a kind but poor artist aboard the luxurious, ill-fated R.M.S. Titanic.
actual_ending: Rose drops the Heart of the Ocean into the sea; she dreams of reuniting with Jack on the staircase.

title: The Lion King
synopsis: Lion prince Simba and his father are targeted by his bitter uncle, who wants to ascend the throne himself.
actual_ending: Simba defeats Scar, takes his place as king, and presents his cub on Pride Rock.

title: Joker
synopsis: A mentally troubled stand-up comedian embarks on a downward spiral that leads to the creation of an iconic villain.
actual_ending: Arthur dances on a police car amid Gotham riots, anointed as the Joker by his followers.

title: Oppenheimer
synopsis: The story of American scientist J. Robert Oppenheimer and his role in the development of the atomic bomb.
actual_ending: Oppenheimer envisions the chain reaction setting the atmosphere on fire — a metaphor for the world he unleashed.

title: Avengers: Endgame
synopsis: After the devastating events of Infinity War, the universe is in ruins. The Avengers assemble once more to undo Thanos's actions.
actual_ending: Tony snaps the Stones, sacrificing himself; Cap returns to Peggy and lives a full life.

title: Whiplash
synopsis: A promising young drummer enrolls at a cut-throat music conservatory where his dreams of greatness are mentored by an instructor.
actual_ending: Andrew's blistering drum solo silences the room; Fletcher gives him the smallest nod.

title: Parasite
synopsis: Greed and class discrimination threaten the newly formed symbiotic relationship between the wealthy Park family and the destitute Kim clan.
actual_ending: Ki-woo dreams of buying the house to free his father — but it's only a dream from the same basement.

title: Spirited Away
synopsis: During her family's move to the suburbs, Chihiro wanders into a world ruled by gods, witches, and spirits.
actual_ending: Chihiro identifies her parents and walks back through the tunnel, never looking back.

title: Schindler's List
synopsis: In German-occupied Poland, Oskar Schindler becomes concerned for his Jewish workforce after witnessing their persecution.
actual_ending: Schindler weeps over the gold ring inscribed 'whoever saves one life saves the world entire.'

title: Saving Private Ryan
synopsis: Following the Normandy Landings, a group of U.S. soldiers go behind enemy lines to retrieve a paratrooper.
actual_ending: Captain Miller dies whispering 'earn this'; old Ryan asks his wife if he's been a good man.

title: The Green Mile
synopsis: The lives of guards on Death Row are affected by one of their charges: a black man accused of child murder, but who possesses a mysterious gift.
actual_ending: John Coffey is executed; old Paul, cursed to outlive everyone, walks his still-living mouse.

title: Shutter Island
synopsis: A U.S. Marshal investigates the disappearance of a murderess from a hospital for the criminally insane.
actual_ending: Teddy chooses lobotomy: 'live as a monster, or die as a good man?' He walks to the lighthouse.

title: Django Unchained
synopsis: With the help of a German bounty hunter, a freed slave sets out to rescue his wife from a brutal Mississippi plantation owner.
actual_ending: Django blows up Candyland and rides off with Broomhilda, free at last.

title: No Country for Old Men
synopsis: Violence and mayhem ensue after a hunter stumbles upon a drug deal gone wrong and more than two million dollars in cash near the Rio Grande.
actual_ending: Sheriff Bell narrates a dream of his father riding ahead with a horn of fire — then wakes.

title: La La Land
synopsis: While navigating their careers in Los Angeles, a pianist and an actress fall in love while attempting to reconcile their aspirations.
actual_ending: Mia walks into Sebastian's club, exchanges one knowing smile, and leaves with her husband.

title: The Departed
synopsis: An undercover cop and a mole in the police attempt to identify each other while infiltrating an Irish gang in South Boston.
actual_ending: Dignam shoots Sullivan in his apartment; a rat scurries past the railing.

title: Gone Girl
synopsis: With his wife's disappearance having become the focus of an intense media circus, a man sees the spotlight turned on him.
actual_ending: Amy returns covered in Desi's blood, traps Nick with a pregnancy, and they smile for the cameras.

title: Inglourious Basterds
synopsis: In Nazi-occupied France during WWII, a plan to assassinate Nazi leaders by a group of Jewish U.S. soldiers coincides with a theatre owner's vengeful plans.
actual_ending: Hitler dies in a burning cinema; Aldo carves a swastika into Landa's forehead.

title: Goodfellas
synopsis: The story of Henry Hill and his life in the mob, covering his relationship with his wife and his mob partners.
actual_ending: Henry, in witness protection, picks up the morning paper in suburban anonymity.

title: Breaking Bad
synopsis: A high school chemistry teacher diagnosed with terminal cancer turns to manufacturing and selling methamphetamine to secure his family's future.
actual_ending: Walter dies on the meth lab floor as 'Baby Blue' plays, finally at peace.

title: Game of Thrones
synopsis: Nine noble families fight for control over the lands of Westeros, while an ancient enemy returns after being dormant for millennia.
actual_ending: Bran the Broken is named king; Jon goes north of the Wall; Arya sails west of Westeros.

title: Stranger Things
synopsis: When a young boy disappears, his mother, a police chief and his friends must confront terrifying supernatural forces in order to get him back.
actual_ending: The Upside Down has bled into Hawkins; Vecna's storm engulfs the town.

title: Squid Game
synopsis: Hundreds of cash-strapped players accept a strange invitation to compete in children's games for a tempting prize but with deadly stakes.
actual_ending: Gi-hun dyes his hair red, turns from his flight, and walks back to find the games.

title: Money Heist
synopsis: An unusual group of robbers attempt to carry out the most perfect robbery in Spanish history — stealing 2.4 billion euros from the Royal Mint of Spain.
actual_ending: The crew melts the gold, fakes their deaths, and disappears into the world wealthy.

title: The Office
synopsis: A mockumentary on a group of typical office workers, where the workday consists of ego clashes, inappropriate behavior, and tedium.
actual_ending: The crew gathers in the parking lot one last time; Pam paints the office on canvas.

title: Friends
synopsis: Follows the personal and professional lives of six twenty to thirty-something-year-old friends living in Manhattan.
actual_ending: Everyone leaves their keys on the counter and walks out for one last coffee.

title: Chernobyl
synopsis: A dramatization of the true story of one of the worst man-made catastrophes in history: the catastrophic nuclear accident at Chernobyl.
actual_ending: Legasov hangs himself; his tapes finally tell the truth the state tried to bury.

title: Dark
synopsis: A family saga with a supernatural twist, set in a German town where the disappearance of two young children exposes the relationships among four families.
actual_ending: Jonas and Martha unravel the bootstrap world; Winden vanishes and they finally cease to exist.

title: Peaky Blinders
synopsis: A gangster family epic set in 1900s England, centering on a gang who sew razor blades in the peaks of their caps.
actual_ending: Tommy rides off alone, having broken the bonds of his demons and family — for now.

title: Westworld
synopsis: At a Western-themed amusement park, the highly sophisticated androids begin to malfunction and develop free will.
actual_ending: Dolores ends humanity's simulation; the hosts awaken into a world they finally control.

title: House of Cards
synopsis: A Congressman works with his equally conniving wife to exact revenge on the people who betrayed him.
actual_ending: Claire stabs Doug, becomes President in her own right, and breaks the fourth wall.

title: Sacred Games
synopsis: A Bombay police officer receives a phone call from a gangster who tells him to save the city in 25 days, plunging him into Mumbai's underbelly.
actual_ending: Sartaj reaches the bunker; the bomb's countdown reaches zero in shocking silence.

title: Mirzapur
synopsis: A shocking incident at a wedding procession ignites a series of events entangling the lives of two families in the lawless city of Mirzapur.
actual_ending: Guddu massacres the Tripathis at the wedding; Munna dies; the throne sits empty.

title: Scam 1992: The Harshad Mehta Story
synopsis: Set in 1980s and 90s Bombay, it follows the life of Harshad Mehta, the stockbroker who took the entire stock market on a ride.
actual_ending: Harshad collapses in custody; markets crash; the system buries the receipts.

title: The Family Man
synopsis: A working man from the National Investigation Agency tries to protect the nation while keeping his family safe.
actual_ending: Srikant defuses the bioweapon at the last second; Chellam Sir warns him: it's not over.

title: Panchayat
synopsis: A comedy-drama, which captures the journey of an engineering graduate Abhishek, who joins as a Panchayat secretary in a remote village of UP.
actual_ending: Abhishek finally clears CAT but stays one more season — home is where the camera is.

title: Delhi Crime
synopsis: Inspired by the 2012 Delhi gang rape, the show charts the Delhi Police investigation into the case.
actual_ending: Vartika nails the last suspect; the team toasts a small victory in a city that still hurts.

title: Kota Factory
synopsis: A black-and-white look at the life of an IIT aspirant in the coaching capital of India.
actual_ending: Vaibhav writes JEE; Jeetu Bhaiya watches the boys go, lighting another quiet cigarette.

title: Gullak
synopsis: A piggy bank narrates the everyday stories of a middle-class North Indian family.
actual_ending: The Mishra family gathers around the dinner table; the gullak smiles and breaks open to start over.

title: Aspirants
synopsis: A coming-of-age drama based on the life of three best friends preparing to crack the UPSC examinations in Old Rajinder Nagar.
actual_ending: SK fails again; Abhilash takes the IAS oath; their friendship outlives the rank list.

title: Paatal Lok
synopsis: A disillusioned cop is assigned a high-profile case that tumbles him into a darker conspiracy than he could have imagined.
actual_ending: Hathi Ram exposes the conspiracy off-record; the system swallows the truth, again.

title: Kabhi Khushi Kabhie Gham
synopsis: A wealthy patriarch disowns his adopted son for marrying outside their class; the family slowly drifts apart across continents.
actual_ending: Rohan reunites the family in London after Yash sees them dance again.

title: Kabhi Alvida Naa Kehna
synopsis: Two unhappily married New Yorkers begin an affair that fractures both households.
actual_ending: Years later Dev and Maya meet again on the same train platform and finally start over together.

title: Om Shanti Om
synopsis: A junior artist murdered in 1977 is reincarnated as a superstar bent on exposing his killer.
actual_ending: Mukesh confesses on a haunted film set; chandelier falls on him just like Shanti's death.

title: Don
synopsis: A police informant impersonates a slain crime lord to bust an international drug ring.
actual_ending: Don himself was the real one all along — Roma realizes too late as he walks free with the encrypted disk.

title: Agneepath
synopsis: A man returns to Mandwa after fifteen years to take down the gangster who hanged his father.
actual_ending: Vijay kills Kancha but is fatally stabbed; he dies in his mother's lap on the village beach.

title: Singham
synopsis: An honest Goa cop is transferred to a town ruled by a cruel MLA and decides to dismantle him.
actual_ending: Singham forces Jaikant Shikre to publicly confess at gunpoint, then kills him on camera.

title: Rowdy Rathore
synopsis: A petty thief discovers he's the lookalike of a slain encounter cop and takes up his mission.
actual_ending: Vikram Rathore's lookalike kills the warlord and assumes his identity to raise the dead cop's daughter.

title: Baahubali: The Beginning
synopsis: A young man raised by villagers learns he is the heir to a Mahishmati throne usurped by his cousin.
actual_ending: Kattappa reveals he was forced to kill Amarendra Baahubali — Shiva swears revenge.

title: Baahubali 2: The Conclusion
synopsis: Why Kattappa killed Baahubali — and how the heir reclaims his throne.
actual_ending: Mahendra Baahubali kills Bhallaladeva and crowns himself; Devasena is freed after twenty-five years.

title: K.G.F: Chapter 1
synopsis: A poor Bombay slum boy promised his dying mother riches, grows into a feared assassin who infiltrates the Kolar Gold Fields.
actual_ending: Rocky kills Andrews, takes over the goldfields and is crowned 'Rocky Bhai' by the slaves.

title: K.G.F: Chapter 2
synopsis: Rocky's grip on the goldfields tightens as the Indian government and rival Adheera plot his fall.
actual_ending: Rocky sinks his ship full of gold rather than surrender; Inayat Khalil and Adheera are both dead.

title: Pushpa: The Rise
synopsis: A coolie rises through Andhra's red-sandalwood smuggling syndicate by sheer cunning.
actual_ending: Pushpa humiliates the corrupt SP by stripping in front of him, vowing this is only the beginning.

title: Vikram
synopsis: A black-ops agent is reactivated to investigate a string of masked killings in Chennai.
actual_ending: Vikram and his team eliminate the cartel; final scene reveals Rolex, hinting at a bigger universe.

title: Master
synopsis: An alcoholic college professor is transferred to a juvenile detention center ruled by a brutal don.
actual_ending: JD beats Bhavani to death in a long-take fight and frees the boys from his grip.

title: Super Deluxe
synopsis: Four interlinked Chennai stories about a transwoman parent, a porn-star wife, a porn boy and a god in the sky.
actual_ending: All four threads converge: the wife buries the body, the trans parent is accepted, the boy reaches school, and the literal god watches benignly.

title: Bhool Bhulaiyaa
synopsis: A New York psychiatrist visits his cousin's ancestral haveli to debunk a possession.
actual_ending: Avni — not Radha — was the one truly possessed by Manjulika; Aditya exorcises her and the ghost is laid to rest.

title: Court
synopsis: A Mumbai folk singer is accused of inciting a sewage worker's suicide; the trial drags on absurdly.
actual_ending: The judge dozes off on a beach holiday and slaps a child for waking him — the system endures, indifferent.

title: English Vinglish
synopsis: A homemaker secretly enrolls in a New York English class to win her family's respect.
actual_ending: Shashi gives her niece's wedding speech in English, reclaims her dignity and chooses her husband again on her own terms.

title: Paa
synopsis: A 12-year-old boy with a rare ageing disorder fights for his estranged parents to reunite.
actual_ending: Auro dies after his parents' wedding; Vidya gives birth to a healthy girl named after him.

title: Guzaarish
synopsis: A quadriplegic magician fights in court for the right to die.
actual_ending: Ethan gets euthanasia approved by his loved ones at a private dinner instead of the court — his way.

title: Rockstar
synopsis: A naive Delhi college boy becomes a global rock icon while haunted by an unattainable love.
actual_ending: Heer dies in Janardhan's arms; he plays one last anthem to a stadium that knows nothing of her.

title: Tamasha
synopsis: A man performing 'normal' for the world breaks down and tries to find the storyteller he was as a boy.
actual_ending: Ved auditions his old self in front of a corporate jury — Tara watches, smiling at the man she always saw.

title: Yeh Jaawani Hai Deewani
synopsis: A workaholic boy and a free-spirited girl reunite years after a Manali trek for a wedding.
actual_ending: Bunny chooses Naina at the wedding sangeet, finally trading his career compulsion for real life.

title: Aashiqui 2
synopsis: A drunk has-been singer mentors a young girl into a star while spiraling himself.
actual_ending: RJ kills himself to free Arohi from his shadow; she finishes their concert duet alone.

title: Ek Villain
synopsis: A reformed assassin hunts the serial killer who murdered his terminally-ill wife.
actual_ending: Guru beats Rakesh to death after the latter's confession; Aisha's last wish list is fulfilled.

title: Kabir Singh
synopsis: A brilliant but volatile surgeon spirals into addiction after losing the love of his life.
actual_ending: Preeti returns to Kabir, pregnant; they reunite at her grandfather's deathbed.

title: Sardar Udham
synopsis: Sardar Udham Singh's twenty-year mission to assassinate Michael O'Dwyer for Jallianwala Bagh.
actual_ending: Udham shoots O'Dwyer in Caxton Hall; he is hanged and his ashes are returned to India in 1974.

title: Mimi
synopsis: A small-town aspiring actress agrees to be a surrogate for a foreign couple — and is then abandoned.
actual_ending: Mimi raises Raj as her own; the bio parents return, but the boy chooses Mimi as his family.

title: Jolly LLB
synopsis: A Meerut lawyer takes up a high-profile hit-and-run PIL against a celebrity son in Delhi.
actual_ending: Jolly forces the spoilt heir to plead guilty; the rich father is also implicated.

title: Jolly LLB 2
synopsis: A Lucknow lawyer redeems himself by exposing a fake encounter that killed an innocent expectant father.
actual_ending: The corrupt cop is convicted; the encounter victim's widow gets justice and a son's name.

title: Padosan
synopsis: A bumbling village simpleton enlists his theatre friends to woo the girl-next-door away from her music teacher.
actual_ending: Bhola wins Bindu's hand by lip-syncing to Kishore's voice; Master-ji concedes graciously.

title: Anand
synopsis: A cancer patient determined to live joyfully changes the life of his cynical doctor.
actual_ending: Anand dies smiling; a tape of his voice plays at his memorial — the Babumoshai he taught how to laugh.

title: Guide
synopsis: A tour guide turned reluctant saint fasts for rain in a drought-ridden village.
actual_ending: Raju dies during the fast as the rains finally arrive — saint and sinner at once.

title: Pakeezah
synopsis: A courtesan dreams of escaping her gilded cage when a stranger leaves her a love letter on a moving train.
actual_ending: Sahibjaan is married off to the man who wrote the letter; she dances at the wedding and collapses.

title: Amar Akbar Anthony
synopsis: Three brothers separated in childhood are raised Hindu, Muslim and Christian, and reunite as adults.
actual_ending: All three save their dying mother with a triple blood transfusion; villains are crushed in a final brawl.

title: Don
synopsis: A police informant doubles as a slain Mumbai don to bust an international drug ring.
actual_ending: Vijay kills DSP D'Silva's killer and clears his name; the diary nails the cartel.

title: Zanjeer
synopsis: A driven cop hunts the killer of his parents in a smuggling racket.
actual_ending: Vijay strangles Teja with the very chain he wore as a child; the haunting nightmare ends.

title: Deewar
synopsis: Two brothers — a smuggler and a cop — confront each other after a lifetime of class injustice.
actual_ending: Vijay dies in his mother's lap on the temple steps; Ravi salutes.

title: Mughal-E-Azam
synopsis: A Mughal prince's love for a court dancer triggers a clash with his emperor father.
actual_ending: Anarkali is sealed alive in a wall; the historical record is rewritten to spare Salim.

title: Sholay (rerelease)
synopsis: Two crooks are hired to capture a sadistic dacoit in Ramgarh.
actual_ending: Veeru and Basanti ride away; Jai dies in Veeru's arms after blowing up the bridge.

title: Mr. India
synopsis: A poor violinist gets an invisibility device left by his scientist father and takes on Mogambo.
actual_ending: Mr. India destroys Mogambo's island base — 'Mogambo khush hua' becomes his last words.

title: Hum Aapke Hain Koun..!
synopsis: Two affectionate Delhi-Bombay families navigate weddings, loss and reunions across one season.
actual_ending: Prem marries Nisha after his sister-in-law's death is mourned and life resumes.

title: Hum Saath-Saath Hain
synopsis: A modern Ramayana set in a wealthy joint-family business.
actual_ending: The brothers reunite around their mother and the eldest is reinstated as heir.

title: Vivah
synopsis: An arranged-match couple bond through letters as the wedding nears, until tragedy strikes.
actual_ending: Burnt in a fire on her wedding eve, Poonam is married to Prem in the hospital — they walk into life together.

title: Ghajini
synopsis: A Mumbai businessman with anterograde amnesia hunts the men who murdered his girlfriend.
actual_ending: Sanjay kills Ghajini in the asylum after one final tattooed reminder; he is institutionalised, cared for.

title: Krrish 3
synopsis: Krrish protects Mumbai from a wheelchair-bound mutant warlord and his shape-shifting army.
actual_ending: Krrish defeats Kaal; his cloned 'son' is given Kaya's heart and accepted as family.

title: Robot (Endhiran)
synopsis: An advanced humanoid robot's emotion chip turns him against his creator.
actual_ending: Chitti is dismantled; a museum displays him 'because he can think' — a quiet warning.

title: Ek Tha Tiger
synopsis: A RAW agent falls in love with a Pakistani ISI agent on a Dublin mission.
actual_ending: Tiger and Zoya disappear together — neither RAW nor ISI can find them.

title: Tiger Zinda Hai
synopsis: Tiger leads a joint Indo-Pak op to rescue nurses kidnapped by an ISIS-like group in Iraq.
actual_ending: All hostages are freed; Tiger is presumed dead but reappears with Zoya in the Alps.

title: War
synopsis: A RAW agent goes rogue; his protégé is sent to hunt him.
actual_ending: It's revealed Kabir is undercover; he and Khalid kill the real traitor and disappear together.

title: Pathaan
synopsis: An exiled RAW agent returns to stop a rogue ex-RAW operative from unleashing a smallpox bioweapon.
actual_ending: Pathaan and Tiger team up; Jim is killed in the air-drop finale.

title: Dunki
synopsis: Four small-town friends take the donkey route to London chasing dreams.
actual_ending: Decades later, they take Manu's last wish — to die in Punjab — back illegally over the border, this time as old men.

title: Phir Hera Pheri
synopsis: Three friends fall for a Ponzi scheme and have to recover the money before the kingpin kills them.
actual_ending: Babu Bhaiya, Raju and Shyam stumble into the kidnapping plot, accidentally rescue the girl and become rich.

title: Welcome
synopsis: A respectable boy must marry a gangster's sister; chaos ensues across two Don families.
actual_ending: Both dons agree to retire; Rajiv marries Sanjana and Uday accepts him as family.

title: Golmaal: Fun Unlimited
synopsis: Four conmen pretend to be the long-lost grandsons of a blind couple living in a beach bungalow.
actual_ending: The real grandson returns; the boys are caught but accepted by the loving couple.

title: Housefull
synopsis: A perpetually unlucky man tries to fake a marriage in London and ends up in a tangle of identities.
actual_ending: All couples are sorted out at a multi-wedding finale; Aarush gets his real bride.

title: Hum Tum
synopsis: A cartoonist and a serious girl keep crossing paths over a decade across continents.
actual_ending: After her widowhood, Karan and Rhea finally marry — twelve years after the plane ride.

title: Paan Singh Tomar
synopsis: An army athlete-turned-medal-winner becomes a Chambal rebel after the system fails him.
actual_ending: Paan Singh is gunned down by police; the closing scrolls his stadium records.

title: The Dirty Picture
synopsis: A South Indian B-grade siren rises and falls in 1980s film industry.
actual_ending: Silk dies of an overdose, leaving a note thanking Ramakant for the only real love she knew.

title: Ankhon Dekhi
synopsis: A middle-aged Old Delhi clerk decides to believe only what he sees with his own eyes.
actual_ending: Bauji jumps off a hill to test his belief that flight is possible if he wills it; he dies, free at last.

title: Masoom
synopsis: An architect's wife meets the illegitimate son she never knew about.
actual_ending: Indu accepts the boy at the airport gate; the family chooses to start over together.

title: Salaam Bombay!
synopsis: A small-town runaway boy survives Mumbai's red-light district as a tea-boy.
actual_ending: Krishna kills Baba; the police take everyone away; Krishna sits alone, spinning a top under a streetlight.

title: Dil Se..
synopsis: An All India Radio reporter falls for an enigmatic woman who is in fact a militant suicide bomber.
actual_ending: Amar embraces Meghna in Delhi just as her vest detonates — they die together.

title: Delhi-6
synopsis: A young NRI returns with his ailing grandmother to old Delhi and witnesses Hindu-Muslim tension catalysed by a 'kala bandar' rumor.
actual_ending: Roshan is shot trying to stop a riot; his grandmother's wish to die in Chandni Chowk is fulfilled.

title: Rang Rasiya
synopsis: Painter Raja Ravi Varma fights blasphemy charges for portraying Hindu goddesses on litho-print.
actual_ending: He wins the trial after a fiery courtroom defence; his lithographs democratize Hindu iconography.

title: Sadma
synopsis: A Bangalore teacher rescues an amnesiac girl from a brothel and cares for her until her memory returns.
actual_ending: Once cured, Nehalata fails to recognise Somu as he chases her train, banging the window — he is left alone.

title: Astitva
synopsis: A wife confesses a one-time affair from twenty years ago; her son turns out to be its product.
actual_ending: Aditi walks out of her hypocritical husband's home, choosing dignity over the comfortable cage.

title: Water
synopsis: An eight-year-old widow and a young one find love and hope in 1938 Banaras.
actual_ending: Shakuntala puts Chuyia on Gandhi's train under Narayan's care, choosing the girl's future over her ashram.

title: Hindustan Ki Kasam
synopsis: An Indian Air Force officer leads a special op during the 1971 war.
actual_ending: The squadron destroys the Pakistani radar; the officer survives to see the surrender at Dhaka.

title: Border
synopsis: Indian troops at Longewala defend a forward post against an entire armoured Pakistani brigade.
actual_ending: Major Chandpuri's men hold till dawn; the Indian Air Force decimates the tanks at first light.

title: Lakshya
synopsis: A directionless rich Delhi boy joins the army and finds purpose at Kargil.
actual_ending: Captain Karan Shergill leads the assault on a Tiger Hill peak; the post is captured and the war won.

title: The Tashkent Files
synopsis: A young journalist is tasked with investigating Lal Bahadur Shastri's mysterious 1966 death.
actual_ending: The committee delivers a split report; the journalist is offered hush money and ascends, ambiguous.

title: Shaitaan
synopsis: A man holds a family hostage by hypnotising the daughter at their farmhouse.
actual_ending: The father uses an old guru's amulet to break the spell; the cult-leader is killed in the basement ritual.

title: Sairat
synopsis: A Maratha-cricketer boy and an upper-caste girl elope in defiance of village honour codes.
actual_ending: Years later, after a child, both are murdered by the girl's family in their Hyderabad home — the toddler walks out alone in blood.

title: OMG: Oh My God!
synopsis: An atheist shopkeeper sues god after his shop is destroyed in an earthquake.
actual_ending: Krishna himself helps him win in court; the godmen are exposed and people pray to Kanji's idol — which he rejects.

title: OMG 2
synopsis: A Shiva devotee sues the school system over the moral panic that drove his son to attempt suicide.
actual_ending: Kanti wins the right for proper sex education in schools, citing scriptures themselves.

title: Zwigato
synopsis: A laid-off factory worker delivers food on a gig app and slowly drowns under five-star ratings.
actual_ending: Manas walks out of a humiliating delivery; his wife, now earning, supports their family while he reconsiders dignity.

title: Salaar
synopsis: A loyal enforcer is reactivated to protect his childhood friend's bid to rule the city of Khansaar.
actual_ending: Deva crowns Vardha, slaughters the council and reveals himself the true heir — to be continued.

title: Rocky Aur Rani Kii Prem Kahaani
synopsis: A flashy Punjabi boy and a sharp Bengali journalist swap households to win their elders' approval.
actual_ending: Both families let go of their prejudices; Rocky and Rani marry on a Kolkata stage.

title: Brahmastra Part One: Shiva
synopsis: A Mumbai DJ discovers he wields the fire-Astra and joins a secret society of celestial weapons.
actual_ending: Shiva rebirths the Brahmastra by uniting all three pieces; his villainous mother-figure is destroyed.

title: The Kashmir Files
synopsis: A Kashmiri Pandit student traces the truth of his family's 1990 exodus.
actual_ending: Krishna delivers a JNU monologue exposing the genocide; he reconciles with his roots.

title: The Kerala Story
synopsis: Three Kerala nursing students are radicalised and trafficked to ISIS in Syria.
actual_ending: Shalini is captured by allied forces in Afghanistan, surviving but stateless; her testimony reaches Indian media.

title: M.S. Dhoni: The Untold Story
synopsis: A Ranchi ticket-collector's rise from town cricket to India captaincy.
actual_ending: Dhoni hits the winning six in the 2011 World Cup final at Wankhede.

title: Airlift
synopsis: An Indian businessman in Kuwait organises the largest civilian evacuation in history during the 1990 invasion.
actual_ending: All 170,000 Indians are flown home; Ranjit is honoured by the Indian government.

title: Neerja
synopsis: Pan Am flight purser Neerja Bhanot stares down hijackers in Karachi to save 359 passengers.
actual_ending: Neerja is shot shielding three children; she is awarded the Ashoka Chakra posthumously.

title: Gold
synopsis: An assistant manager rebuilds an Indian hockey team for the first post-Independence Olympic gold.
actual_ending: India wins the 1948 London gold against Britain; the new tricolour is hoisted at Wembley.

title: Luck By Chance
synopsis: A struggling actor breaks into Bollywood by exploiting an industry insider's daughter.
actual_ending: Vikram becomes a star but loses Sona; she walks past him on a film set, unaffected, finally a heroine herself.

title: Zindagi Na Milegi Dobara
synopsis: Three friends on a Spain bachelor trip face their fears of love, depth and skydiving.
actual_ending: Each friend confronts a fear; Arjun lets go of money, Kabir of an unwanted marriage, Imran finds his bio dad.

title: Dor
synopsis: A Rajasthani widow's life depends on a Muslim woman from Himachal whose husband her own husband killed.
actual_ending: Meera signs the forgiveness papers; both women return home, free of vengeance.

title: Aastha: In the Prison of Spring
synopsis: A middle-class Mumbai homemaker drifts into prostitution; her husband finds out.
actual_ending: Mansi confesses and quits; Amar forgives her; their marriage survives, scarred and humbled.

title: Ardh Satya
synopsis: An honest Bombay sub-inspector is crushed between corrupt politicians, bosses and his abusive father.
actual_ending: Anant strangles a corrupt councillor and surrenders, finally on his own moral terms.

title: Nayakan
synopsis: A Tamil migrant becomes Bombay's underworld 'godfather' protecting his Dharavi people.
actual_ending: Velu is killed by his estranged grandson on the temple steps where it all began.

title: Kaala
synopsis: A Dharavi don fights a Hindutva politician for slum land rights.
actual_ending: Kaala is reborn in revolution — black, blue and red splash the city as the people rise after his fall.

title: The Matrix Reloaded
synopsis: Neo, Trinity and Morpheus race to save Zion from 250,000 Sentinels.
actual_ending: Neo learns he's part of a sixth iteration of The One; Bane is possessed by Smith.

title: The Matrix Revolutions
synopsis: Neo strikes a truce with the Machines to defeat Smith.
actual_ending: Neo neutralises Smith inside the Matrix at the cost of his life; Zion is saved.

title: Dunkirk
synopsis: Allied troops trapped on a French beach evacuate via three intersecting timelines.
actual_ending: Civilian boats ferry hundreds of thousands across the Channel; Mr. Dawson keeps going.

title: Tenet
synopsis: A CIA agent learns to manipulate time-inverted bullets to stop World War III.
actual_ending: The Protagonist seals a 'temporal pincer' op in Stalsk-12, foiling Sator's reverse algorithm.

title: Memento
synopsis: A man with anterograde amnesia hunts his wife's killer with tattoos and Polaroids.
actual_ending: Leonard reveals he's choosing to forget that he killed the real attacker years ago — and lies to his future self again.

title: Se7en
synopsis: Two detectives chase a serial killer staging the seven deadly sins.
actual_ending: John Doe presents Mills with his wife's head; Mills shoots him in rage, completing 'wrath'.

title: The Silence of the Lambs
synopsis: A young FBI trainee consults Hannibal Lecter to catch Buffalo Bill.
actual_ending: Clarice kills Bill in his basement; Hannibal escapes prison and calls Clarice to wish her well.

title: Avatar
synopsis: A paraplegic Marine bonds with a Na'vi tribe on Pandora.
actual_ending: Jake's consciousness is permanently transferred to his Na'vi body; the Na'vi expel the humans.

title: Avatar: The Way of Water
synopsis: Jake Sully's family flees to the reef-clan Metkayina to escape a returning RDA.
actual_ending: Quaritch is defeated; Neteyam dies; the Sullys are accepted by the reef people.

title: Braveheart
synopsis: William Wallace leads Scotland in revolt against Edward I of England.
actual_ending: Wallace is hanged, drawn and quartered after one last shout of 'Freedom!'; Robert the Bruce wins independence at Bannockburn.

title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring
synopsis: Nine companions set out to destroy the One Ring in Mordor.
actual_ending: Boromir dies defending the hobbits; the Fellowship breaks; Frodo and Sam continue alone.

title: The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers
synopsis: The remaining members fight separate wars while Frodo nears Mordor.
actual_ending: Helm's Deep stands; Rohan rides to Gondor; Gollum plots Frodo's death.

title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King
synopsis: Frodo reaches Mount Doom while Aragorn rides to claim his throne.
actual_ending: Frodo and Gollum struggle on Mount Doom; the Ring is destroyed; Aragorn is crowned King; Frodo sails to the Grey Havens.

title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey
synopsis: Bilbo Baggins joins thirteen dwarves to reclaim Erebor from Smaug.
actual_ending: Bilbo finds the Ring in Gollum's cave; the company reaches Erebor as Smaug awakens.

title: Star Wars: A New Hope
synopsis: A farm boy joins a Rebellion to destroy the Death Star.
actual_ending: Luke fires the proton torpedo down the exhaust port; the Death Star explodes, the Rebellion is celebrated.

title: The Empire Strikes Back
synopsis: The Rebel Alliance is hunted across the galaxy as Luke trains under Yoda.
actual_ending: Vader reveals he is Luke's father; Han is frozen in carbonite and taken to Jabba.

title: Return of the Jedi
synopsis: The Rebels rescue Han and assault the second Death Star.
actual_ending: Vader saves Luke and destroys the Emperor; the Empire falls; Yoda, Obi-Wan and Anakin watch the Ewok celebration.

title: Star Wars: The Force Awakens
synopsis: A scavenger and a defector spark a Resistance against the First Order.
actual_ending: Rey finds Luke on Ahch-To and offers him his old lightsaber.

title: Rogue One: A Star Wars Story
synopsis: A Rebel team steals the Death Star plans.
actual_ending: All members die transmitting the plans to Princess Leia just before A New Hope begins.

title: The Mandalorian (Season 1)
synopsis: A bounty hunter protects a Force-sensitive child from Imperial remnants.
actual_ending: Mando defeats Moff Gideon and becomes The Child's official guardian under Mandalorian creed.

title: Raiders of the Lost Ark
synopsis: Indy races the Nazis to the Ark of the Covenant.
actual_ending: The Ark melts the Nazis; the US government locks it in a warehouse.

title: Jurassic Park
synopsis: A theme park of cloned dinosaurs goes catastrophically wrong on opening weekend.
actual_ending: Grant, Sattler and the Murphy kids escape by helicopter as the T-Rex saves them from raptors.

title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
synopsis: A boy hides a stranded alien in his California suburb.
actual_ending: Elliott helps E.T. phone home; the spaceship returns and they part with the words 'I'll be right here'.

title: Back to the Future
synopsis: A teen accidentally travels to 1955 in a DeLorean and must get his parents to fall in love.
actual_ending: Marty returns to a better 1985; Doc arrives in a flying car asking him to come to the future.

title: The Truman Show
synopsis: A man slowly realises his entire life is a 24/7 TV show.
actual_ending: Truman walks through the painted-sky exit door, says his goodbye line and leaves the studio.

title: The Sixth Sense
synopsis: A child psychologist treats a boy who claims to see dead people.
actual_ending: Crowe realises he himself has been dead since the opening scene; he says goodbye to his wife and crosses over.

title: Good Will Hunting
synopsis: A South Boston janitor turns out to be a math genius and is mentored by a grieving therapist.
actual_ending: Will leaves a note 'had to go see about a girl' and drives west to find Skylar in California.

title: A Beautiful Mind
synopsis: Mathematician John Nash's hallucinations and Nobel Prize.
actual_ending: Nash accepts his Nobel and ignores the hallucinations he's lived with for decades.

title: The King's Speech
synopsis: King George VI overcomes a stammer with the help of an unconventional therapist.
actual_ending: He delivers the 1939 wartime radio speech without faltering; he and Logue remain lifelong friends.

title: 12 Years a Slave
synopsis: A free black man is kidnapped and sold into Louisiana slavery.
actual_ending: Solomon is finally rescued and reunited with his family in Saratoga, twelve years after.

title: Once Upon a Time in Hollywood
synopsis: A fading TV star and his stunt double drift through 1969 Los Angeles.
actual_ending: Cliff and Rick repel the Manson family; Sharon Tate lives, inviting Rick over for a drink.

title: Kill Bill: Vol. 1
synopsis: A bride awakens from a coma to murder her former assassination squad.
actual_ending: The Bride defeats O-Ren on a snowy Tokyo garden; she is told her daughter is alive.

title: Kill Bill: Vol. 2
synopsis: She finishes the rest of the squad and finally meets Bill.
actual_ending: The Bride uses the Five-Point-Palm Exploding-Heart Technique on Bill and reunites with her daughter B.B.

title: Birdman
synopsis: A washed-up superhero actor stages a Broadway play in a desperate bid for relevance.
actual_ending: Riggan shoots himself onstage but survives; he jumps from a window — his daughter looks up and smiles.

title: Parasite
synopsis: A poor Korean family infiltrates a wealthy household one job at a time.
actual_ending: After a basement double-murder, Ki-woo dreams of buying the house to free his father — a quiet Morse-code letter ends it all.

title: Ratatouille
synopsis: A rat with a refined palate cooks through a Parisian sous-chef.
actual_ending: Anton Ego writes a glowing review; Gusteau's restaurant is closed but Linguini and Remy open a new bistro.

title: Up
synopsis: A widowed retiree flies his house to South America to honour his wife's dream.
actual_ending: Carl helps Russell save Kevin and the dogs; he and the boy bond as adoptive grandfather and grandson.

title: WALL-E
synopsis: A trash-compactor robot on Earth meets EVE and follows her to space.
actual_ending: Humanity returns to Earth on the Axiom; WALL-E and EVE plant the first sapling together.

title: Toy Story
synopsis: A pull-string cowboy is jealous of a new spaceman toy.
actual_ending: Woody and Buzz catch up to Andy's moving van together — friends, finally.

title: Toy Story 3
synopsis: Andy's toys end up at a daycare ruled by a strawberry-scented bear.
actual_ending: Andy gives the toys to Bonnie; Woody waves goodbye as the boy drives away to college.

title: Finding Nemo
synopsis: A clownfish dad chases a Sydney-bound boat to rescue his son.
actual_ending: Marlin and Dory free Nemo from the dentist; the reef is reunited and a little braver.

title: Frozen
synopsis: An ice-powered queen accidentally freezes her kingdom and her sister.
actual_ending: Anna saves Elsa with an act of true love; Arendelle thaws and the sisters skate together.

title: Encanto
synopsis: A Colombian girl without magical powers must save her gifted family from cracking apart.
actual_ending: Mirabel rebuilds the casita with the family; Abuela embraces her ungifted granddaughter.

title: Aladdin
synopsis: A street thief becomes a prince to win Princess Jasmine.
actual_ending: Aladdin frees the Genie; the Sultan changes the law and lets Jasmine marry whom she chooses.

title: Beauty and the Beast
synopsis: A bookish girl falls for a cursed prince in his enchanted castle.
actual_ending: Belle's love breaks the curse; Beast turns human and the castle is restored.

title: The Incredibles
synopsis: A retired superhero family comes back to stop a fanboy-turned-villain.
actual_ending: The family defeats Syndrome; the Incredibles are publicly licensed again.

title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
synopsis: Brooklyn teen Miles Morales joins Spider-people from across the multiverse.
actual_ending: Miles defeats Kingpin, sends the others home and embraces being his world's Spider-Man.

title: Spider-Man: No Way Home
synopsis: A spell to make people forget Peter Parker's identity opens the multiverse.
actual_ending: Peter cures the villains and asks Doctor Strange to make everyone, including MJ and Ned, forget him.

title: The Batman
synopsis: A second-year Batman hunts the Riddler through a corruption-rotted Gotham.
actual_ending: Bruce reframes himself as a beacon of hope rather than vengeance; the Joker is glimpsed in Arkham.

title: Logan
synopsis: An aged Wolverine smuggles a young mutant girl across America.
actual_ending: Logan dies saving Laura and the kids on the Canadian border; she places his cross sideways into an X.

title: Deadpool
synopsis: A mercenary becomes a wisecracking, immortal antihero hunting the man who tortured him.
actual_ending: Wade carves Ajax with his own knife; he reunites with Vanessa, masked and disfigured.

title: Guardians of the Galaxy
synopsis: A ragtag group of cosmic outlaws form an unlikely team.
actual_ending: The Guardians stop Ronan; Quill keeps the Power Stone in a Nova Corps vault.

title: Inside Out
synopsis: Five emotions inside a girl's mind navigate her family's move to San Francisco.
actual_ending: Joy and Sadness rebuild Riley's core memories together; Riley reconciles with her parents.

title: Coco
synopsis: A boy crosses into the Land of the Dead to find his musician ancestor.
actual_ending: Miguel restores his great-great-grandfather's place in Mama Coco's memory; Hector survives in legend.

title: The Shape of Water
synopsis: A mute janitor falls for a captured amphibian creature in a Cold War lab.
actual_ending: Elisa is shot but the creature heals her gills; they descend together into the water, alive.

title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
synopsis: A laundromat owner is the only one who can stop a multiversal nemesis — her daughter.
actual_ending: Evelyn embraces Joy across a googly-eye bagel; she chooses kindness over despair, and the family heals.

title: Nomadland
synopsis: A widow takes to the American West in a van after her town's gypsum plant closes.
actual_ending: Fern returns to Empire one last time, says goodbye to the empty house, and drives off into the sunrise — alone but not lonely.

title: The Imitation Game
synopsis: Alan Turing leads the codebreaking effort against Enigma at Bletchley Park.
actual_ending: Turing breaks Enigma but is later prosecuted for being gay; he chemically-castrated, dies of cyanide poisoning.

title: Ford v Ferrari
synopsis: Carroll Shelby and Ken Miles build a Ford to beat Ferrari at Le Mans 1966.
actual_ending: Miles slows down at the finish for Ford's PR; another Ford wins by a nose; Miles dies in a test crash months later.

title: The Social Network
synopsis: Mark Zuckerberg's rise from Harvard dorm to a multibillion-dollar Facebook lawsuit.
actual_ending: He sits in a deposition room refreshing Erica Albright's friend request — a billion users, alone.

title: The Wolf of Wall Street
synopsis: Penny-stock king Jordan Belfort's quaalude-fuelled rise and fall.
actual_ending: Belfort gets a light sentence, betrays Donnie; afterwards he tours the world teaching sales.

title: The Revenant
synopsis: A frontiersman crawls 200 miles for revenge after a bear mauling and his son's murder.
actual_ending: Hugh Glass kills Fitzgerald with help from the Arikara, then collapses in the snow as he sees his late wife.

title: Mad Max: Fury Road
synopsis: Across a post-apocalyptic desert, a war-rig driver smuggles five wives away from a tyrant.
actual_ending: Furiosa kills Immortan Joe and rides his rig to the Citadel; the people are freed.

title: The Grand Budapest Hotel
synopsis: A legendary hotel concierge is framed for the murder of an elderly aristocrat.
actual_ending: Gustave clears his name, dies in a war years later; his lobby boy Zero inherits the hotel and remembers him.

title: Knives Out
synopsis: A detective investigates the suspicious death of a mystery novelist patriarch.
actual_ending: Marta is the rightful heir; the murderer Ransom is arrested as Marta drinks coffee from a 'My House' mug.

title: Glass Onion: A Knives Out Mystery
synopsis: A second whodunit on a billionaire's Greek island.
actual_ending: Helen torches the Mona Lisa and the glass dome; Miles Bron's empire collapses in flames.

title: The Wire
synopsis: Five seasons across drug corners, docks, schools and newspapers in Baltimore.
actual_ending: McNulty's fake serial killer scam is buried; the city goes on, every actor replaced by a new Marlo, Daniels, Bubbles, Carcetti.

title: The Sopranos
synopsis: A New Jersey mob boss's anxiety attacks lead him to therapy.
actual_ending: Tony eats onion rings with his family at Holsten's; the bell jingles, the screen cuts to black — interpret it yourself.

title: Better Call Saul
synopsis: Slippin' Jimmy McGill becomes lawyer Saul Goodman, then Gene the Cinnabon manager.
actual_ending: Gene confesses on the stand for an extra few years and reunites, briefly, with Kim Wexler in prison.

title: El Camino: A Breaking Bad Movie
synopsis: Jesse Pinkman flees from his Albuquerque ordeal to a new life in Alaska.
actual_ending: He sells his last El Camino, sends a letter to Brock and disappears north — finally free.

title: Succession
synopsis: The Roy children fight over their billionaire father's media empire.
actual_ending: Logan dies; Kendall is voted out; Tom becomes CEO and Shiv silently lets it happen.

title: Ted Lasso
synopsis: A folksy American football coach is hired to coach a Premier League side.
actual_ending: Ted returns to Kansas after winning hearts and an FA Cup; AFC Richmond's family endures.

title: Severance
synopsis: Lumon employees split their work and home memories surgically.
actual_ending: S1: The innies break out for an 'Overtime Contingency' and reveal the truth to the outies.

title: Yellowstone
synopsis: The Dutton family fights to keep the largest contiguous ranch in the United States.
actual_ending: S5 part 2: Beth and Rip resolve the Dutton legacy after Kevin Costner's character is written off.

title: Vikings
synopsis: Ragnar Lothbrok rises from farmer to Norse king and his sons go on to ravage England.
actual_ending: Bjorn's death and Ivar's last battle set the stage for the Great Heathen Army's conquest.

title: The Last of Us
synopsis: Joel smuggles immune teen Ellie across a fungal post-apocalyptic America.
actual_ending: Joel slaughters the Fireflies to save Ellie; he lies to her about the cure — she sees through it.

title: The Mandalorian
synopsis: A bounty hunter protects The Child from Imperial remnants.
actual_ending: S3: Mando regains his honour, reunites with Bo-Katan and reclaims Mandalore.

title: Andor
synopsis: Cassian Andor's path from petty thief to Rebellion martyr.
actual_ending: S1: A failed prison break sets the galaxy alight; Maarva's funeral speech sparks the rebellion on Ferrix.

title: Succession Season 4
synopsis: The final battle for Waystar Royco after Logan's funeral.
actual_ending: Tom is named US CEO by Mattson; Shiv stares ahead in the boardroom; Roman drinks alone in a bar.

title: Squid Game
synopsis: Indebted Koreans compete in deadly children's games for billions of won.
actual_ending: Gi-hun wins, dyes his hair red and turns back at the airport to confront the people behind the games.

title: Kingdom
synopsis: A Joseon-era prince investigates a plague that turns the dead into flesh-eaters.
actual_ending: S2: Lee Chang sacrifices the throne and disappears north to track the resurrection plant.

title: The Lord of the Rings: The Rings of Power
synopsis: Second Age Middle-Earth leading up to the forging of the Rings.
actual_ending: S1: The first three Elven Rings are forged; Sauron is revealed as Halbrand.

title: The Witcher
synopsis: A monster-hunting witcher's destinies tangle with a princess and a sorceress.
actual_ending: S2: Geralt rescues Ciri from Voleth Meir; the trio leaves Kaer Morhen together.

title: The Bear
synopsis: A fine-dining chef takes over his brother's chaotic Chicago beef stand.
actual_ending: S2: The Bear restaurant opens its 'friends and family' night to mixed but transformative results.

title: Only Murders in the Building
synopsis: Three true-crime podcasters investigate murders in their NYC apartment building.
actual_ending: S3: A Broadway-set killer is unmasked; new murder kicks off S4.

title: The Crown
synopsis: Six decades of Queen Elizabeth II's reign.
actual_ending: S6: Elizabeth and Philip plan their funerals; the crown is implicitly handed to a new generation.

title: When They See Us
synopsis: Five Black and Latino teens are wrongfully convicted of the Central Park jogger attack.
actual_ending: Korey Wise is freed when the real attacker confesses; the men are exonerated and settle with NYC.

title: Watchmen (HBO)
synopsis: A masked Tulsa cop confronts a white-supremacist conspiracy decades after the comic.
actual_ending: Angela may have inherited Doctor Manhattan's powers as she steps onto the pool's water in the closing shot.

title: His Dark Materials
synopsis: Lyra Belacqua's quest across parallel worlds and the Authority's empire.
actual_ending: S3: The Authority falls; Lyra and Will say goodbye on the bench in the Botanic Garden.

title: You
synopsis: A bookstore manager's obsessive love drives a murder spree across cities.
actual_ending: S4: Joe poses as 'Jonathan' in London; he is exposed and returns to NYC as a tabloid celebrity.

title: Ozark
synopsis: A financial advisor flees a botched cartel laundering job to the Ozarks.
actual_ending: S4: Marty kills Mel and the Byrdes survive; they remake themselves as Missouri's new powerbrokers.

title: Scam 2003: The Telgi Story
synopsis: Counterfeiter Abdul Karim Telgi's stamp-paper scam shakes Maharashtra.
actual_ending: Telgi is arrested, becomes an informant on rival politicians, dies of meningitis behind bars.

title: The Family Man
synopsis: A middle-class TASC officer juggles family life and Indian counter-terror ops.
actual_ending: S2: Srikant prevents a Sri Lankan suicide attack at a summit; a Chennai outbreak hints at S3.

title: Delhi Crime
synopsis: DCP Vartika Chaturvedi leads the Delhi Police hunt for the 2012 Nirbhaya gang.
actual_ending: All six accused are caught and convicted; she watches the press conference, exhausted.

title: Jamtara: Sabka Number Aayega
synopsis: Jharkhand's phishing-call boom seen from the inside.
actual_ending: S2: The cartel is partially busted but the new generation simply moves to crypto and OTPs.

title: TVF Tripling
synopsis: Three siblings road-trip across India to reset their lives.
actual_ending: S3: They find their parents in Bhutan; the family reunites and Chitvan finally settles down.

title: Permanent Roommates
synopsis: An NRI returns from the US to marry his long-distance girlfriend in Bombay.
actual_ending: S2: Tanya and Mikesh marry on a small terrace; the elders accept them after a season of comic chaos.

title: Flames
synopsis: Two CBSE Class-11 toppers fall in love at a Delhi tuition class.
actual_ending: S4: Rajat and Ishita reconnect at a college reunion; they choose each other again, older and wiser.

title: Special Ops
synopsis: A RAW officer hunts a 2001 Parliament-attack mastermind across decades and continents.
actual_ending: S1: Hafiz is killed in Dubai; S2 reopens with a new cyber-terror plot.

title: The Night Manager (India)
synopsis: A Delhi hotelier infiltrates a Mumbai-based arms dealer's inner circle.
actual_ending: S2: Shaan exposes Shelly Rungta and walks away with Kaveri to begin again.

title: Rangbaaz
synopsis: The rise of UP gangster Shiv Prakash Shukla.
actual_ending: S1: Shukla is killed by a UP police STF in a Ghaziabad encounter.

title: Breathe
synopsis: A football coach manipulates the organ-transplant queue to save his dying son.
actual_ending: S1: Danny's son survives; the cop catches him; the system is exposed.

title: Aarya
synopsis: A wealthy Rajasthani housewife inherits her husband's narcotics business.
actual_ending: S3: Aarya kills Russi and exits the trade; her children begin a clean life abroad.

title: Rocket Boys
synopsis: Homi Bhabha and Vikram Sarabhai's parallel paths to India's space and nuclear programs.
actual_ending: S2: India's first satellite Aryabhata is launched; Bhabha dies in the AI 101 crash; Sarabhai carries on alone.

title: Guns & Gulaabs
synopsis: A 1990s small-town opium war among rival families and an unlikely mechanic.
actual_ending: S1: The cartel is broken; Tipu the mechanic finds love with Chandralekha.
